title: batch-bug-shepherd subagent return shapes
description: Three return shapes, one per wave. Schema-validate every subagent return. On malformed, re-spawn ONCE; on second malformed, mark the row UNCLEAR and continue.

repro_steps.description: Smallest possible reproduction; required when verdict=LEGIT.

evidence.description: Command output, file paths, or commit refs that justify the verdict.

verdict.description: ready-to-merge iff blocking_followups is empty; otherwise needs-author-changes (or reject for fundamental design pushback). recommended_followups MAY be non-empty in any verdict and feeds the completion fan-out under the fold-in invariant.

blocking_followups.description: Severity-blocking findings. The completion subagent MUST resolve each entry before the PR is considered ready. Empty => verdict is ready-to-merge.

recommended_followups.description: Non-blocking but substantive findings the panel surfaced. Under the fold-in invariant (see SKILL.md Architecture invariants) the completion subagent classifies each as FOLD (cheap + on-path; lands in this PR) or DEFER (separable; opens a tracking issue).

source_persona.description: Which panelist surfaced this item (e.g. python-architect, supply-chain-security-expert, devx-ux-expert). The completion subagent uses this to pick the right panelist persona to consult when implementing the fix.

fold_hint.description: Optional hint from the panel about fold-vs-defer classification. Authoritative classification still happens in the completion subagent against the criteria in completion-prompt.md; this is advisory only.

ci_evidence.description: CI run URL or `gh pr checks` summary; required when status=ready-to-merge.

lint_evidence.description: Exit code and silent-output confirmation for the canonical ruff pair; required when status=ready-to-merge.

mutation_break_evidence.description: One entry per regression-trap test added: the test name, the guard deleted, and confirmation that the test failed without the guard.

folded_followups.description: Recommended items the completion subagent landed in THIS PR. Each entry cites the panel id and a one-line summary of what was implemented.

deferred_followups.description: Recommended items the completion subagent classified as separable and filed as tracking issues. tracking_issue is the new issue number returned by gh issue create.

rationale.description: One-sentence reason this item is separable rather than fold-in (e.g. cross-cutting refactor, new feature, broad doc restructure).

blocker.description: Required when status=blocked. One-paragraph human-readable explanation.
